title: apium australe
intro: Apium australe, also known as the Australian celery or wild celery, is a plant species native to Australia and parts of Asia. It is a medicinal plant that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Apium australe include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, and is also used in cooking as a flavoring agent.
